subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1917
subcodes.first_line: Why didst thou not tell me about these wonderful things when we were travelling in America?
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @creation of the world, @spiritual transformation, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause
